# wantedAttributes

**Instance Property**

The attributes requested by the request.

## Declaration

```swift
var wantedAttributes: FSItem.Attribute { get set }
```

## Discussion

This property is a bit field in Objective-C and an [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/OptionSet] in Swift.

## Inspecting requested attributes

- **isAttributeWanted(_:)**: A method that indicates whether the request wants given attribute.
- **FSItem.Attribute**: A value that indicates a set of item attributes to get or set.

items.description: A method that indicates whether the request wants given attribute.
